statement.p: A swimming pool is filling with water from a garden hose at a rate of {12\ {\textstyle\frac{\rm\mathstrut gal}{\rm\mathstrut min}}}\text{.} If the pool already has {120\ {\rm gal}} of water and can hold up to {390\ {\rm gal}}\text{,} set up an inequality modeling how much time can pass without the pool overflowing. There is no need to solve it.
